ux_issues.description: Usage counter shows 0 after sending 1 chat message. The daily_usage count does not appear to increment for messages sent via SendMessage. This may be intentional if usage tracking counts differently, but it is confusing for QA verification.
ux_issues.suggestion: Verify that usage tracking increments on each SendMessage call or document what 'used' actually tracks.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: The trip sharing lifecycle is rock-solid. Token revocation works correctly — old tokens return 404 after unsharing, and re-enabling sharing generates a new distinct token. The shared view contains rich content: full itinerary with 11 items across 6 days, booking summary, and trip metadata, with no private data leakage. The AI created a well-structured Japan itinerary on the first message with expert persona handoff. Booking ingestion parsed the ryokan confirmation accurately including check-in/out dates, room type, and address.
